appraisal_events.evidence: « Je n'en sais absolument rien... gardez vos curiosités pour vous-même... vous faites un impair de tout premier ordre. » Puis, « Le pauvre M. de Vaugoubert... fut assez mal reçu. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Vaugoubert, with an ambiguous smile, tries to involve Charlus; Charlus publicly rebuffs him and the text elaborates by presenting Vaugoubert as a fool soon poorly received, reinforcing his local sidelining.

status_effects.explanation: Rebuffed by Charlus and received coldly by the duchess, Vaugoubert locally loses face and consideration in this milieu.
